title: Document update log type definitions for tracking changes and history
purpose: Defines TypeScript interfaces and types for tracking document changes with timestamps and diffs, enabling history reconstruction and version control.
module_context: Exports interfaces for ChangeEntry, DocumentLogEntry, UpdateLog, HistoryResponse, and VersionResponse, along with a ResourceType union type for categorizing tracked resources.

steps.content: Define structure for a single change entry with timestamp and diff details.
Include ISO timestamp for when the change was made.
Include diff object containing old and new string values.
Define structure for a document log entry containing original content and changes.
Include full original content of the document.
Include array of change entries applied after the original was captured.
Define union type for resource categories that can be tracked.
Include documents, diagrams, designs, spreadsheets, and snippets as valid resource types.
Define complete update log structure mapping resource IDs to their change history.
Include maps for each resource type with document, diagram, design, spreadsheet, and snippet entries.
Define API response structure for retrieving change history of a specific resource.
Include resource ID that was queried.
Include original content of the resource.
Include array of changes with timestamps and diffs.
Define API response structure for retrieving a reconstructed version of a resource.
Include resource ID that was queried.
Include reconstructed content at the requested version.
Include ISO timestamp of the version.
Include version number indicating position in the change history.
